notes: DEATH's six-face arcana die. PEACEFUL is the highest success — the threshold honoured. MISSED is the failure — the candle didn't catch.

faces.description: Success ★★. The threshold is honoured. The candle catches first match. Advance two.
Success ★. The ward is checked. Spend 1 Time, advance one.
Partial. The cupola wind picks up. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 VIGIL).
Partial. The fluorescent above ward 3 ticks twice. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 VIGIL).
Failure. The candle didn't catch. +1 VIGIL.
Wild. ★ if you have HELD HAND this turn. Otherwise: failure, and the gurney moves a half-inch.
